title: 1.1: Creates a getOrAdd method on cache that handles both intermediate map levels (org-level and rule-level) internally when adding state
1.2: Refactors Warm() in manager.go to delegate state storage to the cache via getOrAdd for each alert instance loaded from the database
1.3: Preserves get-or-add semantics in getOrAdd by returning the existing state when a state with the same cache identity already exists
3.1: Removes the unused setAllStates method from the cache after refactoring
4.1: Drops or omits any of the 13 alert instance fields (AlertRuleUID, OrgID, CacheID, Labels, State, StateReason, StartsAt, EndsAt, LastEvaluationTime, Annotations, ...) during warmup restoration
